Container.Name: Indygestion
Container.Overview:
Indygestion — Self-hosted video asset management for YouTube creators.
Features: - Resumable large-file uploads (tus protocol) - Whisper-powered transcription and smart clip grouping - Automatic proxy generation (Intel QSV accelerated) - Archive compression with codec/quality selection - USB/SD card auto-ingest - Single web UI on one port
IMPORTANT: This is a multi-container app (8 services). For the best experience:
Option A (Recommended): Install via Docker Compose Manager plugin: 1. Install "Docker Compose Manager" from Community Applications 2. Add a new compose stack pointing to: https://github.com/SloPOS/indygestion 3. Configure .env and start the stack
Option B: SSH bootstrap script: bash <(curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/SloPOS/indygestion/main/scripts/bootstrap-unraid.sh)
Full docs: https://github.com/SloPOS/indygestion
Container.Requires: Docker Compose Manager plugin (recommended). Intel iGPU for QSV hardware transcoding (optional).

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Indygestion web interface. All services (UI, API, uploads) are served through this single port via nginx.

Config.Name: Media Storage
Config.Description: Unraid share for video storage (projects, staging, archive). Will be created automatically.

Config.Name: Postgres Password
Config.Description: Database password. Set a strong password on first install.

Config.Name: Webhook Secret
Config.Description: Internal webhook secret. Set any random string.

Config.Name: Whisper Model
Config.Description: Whisper transcription model: tiny (fastest), base, small (recommended), medium (most accurate, slowest)

Config.Name: Auto Ingest
Config.Description: Automatically ingest video files from USB/SD devices without confirmation

Config.Name: Video Extensions
Config.Description: File extensions to scan for during ingest
